description_long: This object is a classic American-style hot dog, featuring a plump sausage nestled inside a soft, golden-brown bun. The sausage is topped with a generous zigzag of yellow mustard, which is clearly visible along the length of the sausage. The bun appears fluffy and slightly glossy, with a smooth, rounded exterior and subtle toasting marks on the underside. The sausage itself has a reddish-brown hue and a slightly shiny surface, indicating it is cooked. No additional condiments or toppings are present, and the hot dog is unwrapped, ready to eat. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a street food snack found in urban parks or at food stands.
description: A plump sausage in a soft, golden-brown bun, topped with a zigzag of yellow mustard. The hot dog is unwrapped and visually appetizing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hot dog, with mustard zigzag and the bun's rounded exterior.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open end of the bun and the sausage with mustard running down the center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, showing the underside of the bun with subtle toasting marks and the sausage partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back opening of the bun and the sausage, with mustard visible along the top.
